# Large language model workflow

**User:**   
**Created:** 10/13/2025 9:52:17  
**Updated:** 10/13/2025 9:53:49  
**Exported:** 10/13/2025 9:55:23  
**Link:** [https://claude.ai/chat/7018b2f6-a052-4ed9-bbac-c791a126f05d](https://claude.ai/chat/7018b2f6-a052-4ed9-bbac-c791a126f05d)  

## Prompt:
10/13/2025, 9:52:19 AM

![screenshot.png](data:image/webp;base64,)

so i want to see this in a sequence: first is training data to make LLM; then is the "Input" as depicted to generate RAG, which is interpreted by LLM. then, comes user query?



## Response:
10/13/2025, 9:52:30 AM

You're right to question the sequence! The diagram as shown isn't quite in chronological order. Here's the correct sequence:

## Correct Sequence

**1. Training Phase (happens first, not shown in diagram)**
- Large Language Model (LLM) is trained on massive datasets
- This happens before any of the components shown in the diagram

**2. System Setup Phase**
- Current Policies & Procedures (INPUT) are processed
- Natural Language Processing analyzes these documents
- Vector Embedding & Storage creates searchable representations
- Document Analysis extracts entities and attributes
- Knowledge Base & Regulatory Requirements is built and maintained
- RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) system is configured

**3. Query Phase (runtime operation)**
- User Query comes in
- System retrieves relevant information from the Knowledge Base via RAG
- LLM generates response using both its training and the retrieved context
- OUTPUT: Compliance Report & Recommendations is produced

So you're correct that the diagram shows things a bit out of order. The "INPUT" section is actually part of the **setup/indexing phase** that happens before users start querying. The LLM training happens even earlier, before the entire system is built.

The actual user interaction flow is: User Query → RAG retrieval → LLM processing → Output.



## Prompt:
10/13/2025, 9:53:01 AM

can you generate revised image.



## Response:
10/13/2025, 9:53:49 AM

I'll create a revised diagram that shows the correct chronological sequence of the AI solution architecture.

        background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);\n            min-height: 100vh;\n        }\n        .container {\n            max-width: 1400px;\n            margin: 0 auto;\n center;\n            color: #1e3a8a;\n            margin-bottom: 40px;\n            font-size: 2.5em;\n        }\n        .phase {\n            margin-bottom: 50px;\n            padding: 30px;\n            border-radius: 10px;\n            background: #f8fafc;\n            border-left: 6px solid;\n        }\n        .phase-1 { border-color: #dc2626; }\n        .phase-2 { border-color: #ea580c; }\n bold;\n            color: #1e293b;\n        }\n        .phase-subtitle {\n            color: #64748b;\n            font-size: 14px;\n            margin-top: 5px;\n        }\n        .flow-diagram {\n class=\"container\">\n        <h1>🤖 AI Solution Architecture - Correct Sequence</h1>\n        \n        <!-- Phase 1: Training -->\n        <div class=\"phase phase-1\">\n            <div class=\"phase-header\">\n                <div class=\"phase-number\">1</div>\n                <div>\n                    <div class=\"phase-title\">Training Phase</div>\n                    <div               <div class=\"icon\">📚</div>\n                    <div>Training Data</div>\n                    <div style=\"font-size: 12px; margin-top: 5px;\">(Massive Datasets)</div>\n Model)</div>\n                </div>\n            </div>\n            <div class=\"note\">\n                ⏰ <strong>Timeline:</strong> This happens before the system is deployed. Training can take weeks or months using powerful computing resources.\n            </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <!-- Phase 2: Setup -->\n        <div class=\"phase phase-2\">\n            <div class=\"phase-header\">\n                <div class=\"phase-number\">2</div>\n                <div>\n                    <div class=\"phase-title\">System Setup & Indexing Phase</div>\n                    <div class=\"phase-subtitle\">Preparing the RAG System</div>\n                </div>\n            </div>\n            <div class=\"flow-diagram\" style=\"flex-direction: column; align-items: stretch;\">\n                <div style=\"display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 15px;\">\n                    <div class=\"box box-dark\">\n                        <div class=\"icon\">📋</div>\n                        <div>INPUT: Current Policies & Procedures</div>\n                    </div>\n                    <div class=\"arrow\">→</div>\n                    <div class=\"box box-light\">\n                        <div class=\"icon\">🔤</div>\n                        <div>Natural Language Processing</div>\n                    </div>\n                </div>\n                <div style=\"text-align: center; margin: 10px 0;\">↓</div>\n                <div style=\"display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 15px;\">\n                    <div class=\"box box-light\">\n                        <div class=\"icon\">🗂️</div>\n                        <div>Vector Embedding & Storage</div>\n                    </div>\n                    <div class=\"arrow\">→</div>\n                    <div class=\"box box-light\">\n                        <div class=\"icon\">🔍</div>\n                        <div>Document Analysis Entity & Attribute Extraction</div>\n                    </div>\n                </div>\n                <div style=\"text-align: center; margin: 10px 0;\">↓</div>\n                <div style=\"display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 15px;\">\n                    <div class=\"box box-medium\">\n                        <div class=\"icon\">📚</div>\n                        <div>Knowledge Base & Regulatory Requirements</div>\n                    </div>\n                    <div class=\"arrow\">+</div>\n                    <div class=\"box box-medium\">\n                        <div class=\"icon\">⚡</div>\n                        <div>RAG System Ready</div>\n                    </div>\n                </div>\n            </div>\n            <div class=\"note\">\n                ⚙️ <strong>Setup:</strong> Documents are processed, embedded, and indexed. This creates a searchable knowledge base that the LLM can reference.\n            </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <!-- Phase 3: Runtime -->\n        <div class=\"phase phase-3\">\n            <div class=\"phase-header\">\n                <div class=\"phase-number\">3</div>\n                <div>\n                    <div class=\"phase-title\">Runtime Query Phase</div>\n                    <div class=\"phase-subtitle\">Active User Interaction</div>\n                </div>\n            </div>\n            <div class=\"flow-diagram\" style=\"flex-direction: column; align-items: stretch;\">\n                <div style=\"display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 15px;\">\n                    <div class=\"box box-dark\">\n                        <div class=\"icon\">❓</div>\n                        <div>User Query</div>\n                    </div>\n                    <div class=\"arrow\">→</div>\n                    <div class=\"box box-light\">\n                        <div class=\"icon\">🔎</div>\n                        <div>RAG Retrieves Relevant Context</div>\n                    </div>\n                </div>\n                <div style=\"text-align: center; margin: 10px 0;\">↓</div>\n                <div style=\"display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 15px;\">\n                    <div class=\"box box-light\">\n                        <div class=\"icon\">📚</div>\n                        <div>Retrieved Documents from Knowledge Base</div>\n                    </div>\n                    <div class=\"arrow\">+</div>\n                    <div class=\"box box-light\">\n                        <div class=\"icon\">❓</div>\n                        <div>Original User Query</div>\n                    </div>\n                </div>\n                <div style=\"text-align: center; margin: 10px 0;\">↓</div>\n                <div style=\"display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 15px;\">\n                    <div class=\"box box-medium\">\n                        <div class=\"icon\">🧠</div>\n                        <div>LLM Processing</div>\n                        <div style=\"font-size: 12px; margin-top: 5px;\">(Uses training + retrieved context)</div>\n                    </div>\n                    <div class=\"arrow\">→</div>\n                    <div class=\"box box-dark\">\n                        <div class=\"icon\">✅</div>\n                        <div>OUTPUT: Compliance Report & Recommendations</div>\n                    </div>\n                </div>\n            </div>\n            <div class=\"note\">\n                🚀 <strong>Real-time:</strong> This happens every time a user submits a query. The system retrieves relevant information and generates a contextual response in seconds.\n            </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <div style=\"margin-top: 40px; padding: 25px; background: #e0f2fe; border-radius: 10px; border-left: 6px solid #0284c7;\">\n            <h3 style=\"margin-top: 0; color: #075985;\">🔑 Key Insights</h3>\n            <ul style=\"color: #0c4a6e; line-height: 1.8;\">\n                <li><strong>Phase 1</strong> happens once during initial model development (by AI company)</li>\n                <li><strong>Phase 2</strong> happens during system deployment and when knowledge base is updated</li>\n                <li><strong>Phase 3</strong> happens continuously during normal operation (thousands of times per day)</li>\n                <li><strong>RAG benefit:</strong> Combines the LLM's general knowledge with specific, current organizational data</li>\n            </ul>\n        </div>\n    </div>\n</body>\n</html>\n",
  "description": "Creating an HTML artifact showing the revised AI Solution Architecture with correct chronological sequence"
}

[View your revised architecture diagram](computer:///mnt/user-data/outputs/ai-solution-architecture-revised.html)

I've created a revised diagram that shows the correct chronological sequence with three distinct phases:

1. **Training Phase** - Where the LLM is initially trained on massive datasets
2. **System Setup Phase** - Where your organization's documents are processed and the RAG system is prepared
3. **Runtime Query Phase** - Where users actually interact with the system

Each phase is color-coded and includes timing notes to clarify when each step occurs. This makes it much clearer that training happens first, then the knowledge base is built, and only then do user queries come into play.
